title: centaurea × pagesii
intro: Centaurea × pagesii, also known as Centaurea × pagesii, is a hybrid plant species within the family Asteraceae. It is a perennial plant used in herbal medicine, valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Centaurea × pagesii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
